one_time_description: Change in status of Government Business Enterprises added to accumulated surplus
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Harrison Salmon Producers LP (50%), Sts'ailes Development LP (99%), Sts'ailes Development Corporation (100%), and Sts'ailes Eco Energy Development (Bremner Trio) LP (99%). Royalties received from Sakwi Creek Power Corp and BC Hydro under Impact Benefit Agreement. Forestry, fisheries, and hydro revenue streams pledged as security for FNFA loans. Pension contributions totalled $443,686.
notes: The budget column shows a net loss of $2,819,396 vs actual surplus of $14,340,114 - significant variance from budget. Four entities consolidated (SLD Land Holdings Inc. x2, 1276279 BC Ltd., Sts'ailes Community Care Centre Society) and four GBEs on modified equity basis. Change in status of Government Business Enterprises of $1,436,862 added to accumulated surplus (not through operations). Term loans due on demand of $615,300 classified separately from long-term debt; annual_debt_service includes $508,911 long-term debt repayment plus $1,956,698 term loan repayment. Large capital acquisitions of $13,612,761 in year drove net TCA from $11.8M to $23.7M. No schedule of remuneration included in financial statements. Revenue lines reconstructed from segmented schedule as statement of operations includes budget column. 2024 actual total revenue per statement is $47,757,249. Other government transfers calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($15,182,997) minus own source revenue items.
